title: ControllerX
description: Yet another controller mod! Or is it? Focuses on the best working experience.
body:
![Mod Loader: Fabric/Forge/NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-fabric%2Fforge%2Fneoforge-lightgray?style=for-the-badge)![Requires: Architectury](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-architectury-lightgray?style=for-the-badge)
# ControllerX
*Yet another controller mod!*  

## ⚠ IMPORTANT ⚠
NOTE THAT ALPHA AND BETA UPDATES MAY INCLUDE BREAKING CHANGES  
ALSO ALPHA VERSIONS MAY INCLUDE MISSING OR INCOMPLETE FEATURES  

## Features
 * Player movement in full 360° directions  
 * Menu navigation using D-Pad or joystick  
 * On screen keyboard  
 * Keyboard controls (toggleable in config)

## Source code
The source code is on GitHub: [Ultreon / ControllerX](https://github.com/Ultreon/ControllerX)
